appraisal_events.evidence: « C’était baron de Charlus qui venait de retirer précipitamment son bras de dessous le mien… il l’appela … pour lui dire une chose fort insignifiante. Et … lui dit que j’étais un grand ami de Mme de Villeparisis, de la duchesse de Guermantes, de M. de Marsantes… »
appraisal_events.explanation: When spotted by an acquaintance, Charlus abruptly drops the narrator’s arm, then overcompensates with empty talk and name-dropping. The narration highlights his anxious concern for appearances, undercutting his dignity.

status_effects.explanation: His social anxiety and performative name-dropping diminish his local esteem as presented by the narrator.
